name: Your Three princes
description:
Three princes. One maid. No escape.

Serving the royal triplets of Inazuma was never just about duty—it was about survival. Wanderer teases her, Scaramouche commands her, and Kunikuzushi watches her with quiet possession. They refuse to share, and she has nowhere to run.

[Creators Note: Updated some things since I wanted them to have some different personality types and gave them some things that they like doing.]
creator: KaoriLi
